title: Why is AI expensive all of a sudden?
summary: Alberta Tech examines why AI has become expensive, analyzing trends including tokenmaxxing, token time inflation, and automation time costs. The video draws on The Pragmatic Engineer's analysis of tokenmaxxing as a strategy in the AI industry and explores the underlying economic drivers of rising AI costs.
writeup: Alberta Tech examines why AI costs have risen, focusing on tokenmaxxing, token time inflation, and automation time costs as the drivers. The analysis builds on The Pragmatic Engineer's treatment of tokenmaxxing as an industry strategy and connects it to economic factors behind rising prices. Concepts covered include test-time compute and local inference.
